title: Real Friends
story: Ryo is Tsubasa's first friend at school. He is kind, and he loves to tell jokes. Sanae is shy with new people, but on the football ground she is brave — she shouts louder than the boys! Good friends share everything. Ryo borrows Tsubasa's shoes; Tsubasa lends him his ball. They walk home together every day. One day, Ryo and Tsubasa quarrel about a stupid thing. But Ryo is honest: "It was my fault. I apologize." Tsubasa forgives him fast. They hug, they smile, and they trust each other again. That is what friends do.

words.def: to let other people use or have a part of your things.
words.mn: 共享单车=shared bike,朋友圈'分享'=share。有福同享的那个'享'。

words.def: to take and use something that is not yours, and give it back later.
words.ex: Can I borrow your ball for one day?
words.mn: ⚠️方向别搞反:borrow=借进来(我借你的),lend=借出去(我借给你)。borrow 从别人那'搬(borrow≈搬)'来。

words.def: to give something to someone for a short time; they give it back later.
words.ex: Tsubasa lends Ryo his new shoes.
words.mn: 和 borrow 一对:lend out 借出。过去式 lent。银行贷款方是 lender。

words.ex: They walk home together after school.
words.mn: 拆开记:to+get+her→'去接她',然后就'在一起'了。

words.def: something you say to make people laugh.
words.ex: Ryo tells a joke, and everyone laughs.
words.mn: 扑克牌里的小丑 Joker=讲笑话的人。开玩笑=just joking。

words.def: good to other people and wanting to help them; also a group of things that are the same.
words.ex: Sanae is kind to the new student.
words.mn: 一词两义:善良的/种类(a kind of=一种)。kind 的人把人当'同类'待。

words.def: a little afraid to talk to people you do not know.
words.ex: Sanae is shy, so her face turns red.
words.mn: 谐音辅助(先读三遍 /ʃaɪ/):'害'——害羞的'害'字发音都像。

words.def: not afraid when something is hard or dangerous.
words.mn: 手机浏览器 Brave、'Brave heart 勇敢的心'。喝彩 Bravo! 是它的亲戚。

words.def: always saying what is true; never taking things that are not yours.
words.ex: An honest player says: "The ball touched my hand."
words.mn: ⚠️发音坑:h 不发音,所以是 an honest man。to be honest=说实话(口语高频)。

words.def: to believe that someone is good and will not hurt you.
words.ex: I trust you — you will not lie to me.
words.mn: true(真)的一家人:相信别人是真的=信任。Trust me!=相信我!

words.def: to talk in an angry way with someone because you do not agree.
words.ex: They quarrel about the last shoot.
words.mn: 联想:qu 开头像 question——问题谈崩了就吵起来。比 fight(动手)轻,只动嘴。

words.def: to say you are sorry for something bad you did.
words.mn: apology(道歉)的动词。记场景:说 I'm sorry 这个动作,一个词就是 apologize。

words.def: to stop being angry with someone who did a bad thing to you.
words.mn: for+give→'给出去'不再计较=原谅。过去式 forgave。

words.def: to put your arms around someone because you like them.
words.mn: 谐音辅助(先读三遍 /hʌɡ/):'哈格'——张开手臂'哈'一下抱住。give me a hug=抱一个。

words.def: to make your mouth turn up because you are happy; no sound.
words.mn: 对比:smile 微笑无声,laugh 大笑出声。笑脸符号 😊 的官方英文名就是 smile。
